_comment: JCLRNT - Jointly Contrastive Representation Learning on Road Network and Trajectory (CIKM 2022)
_note_embed_size: Embedding dimension for road segments (from paper)
_note_hidden_size: Hidden dimension for transformer and graph encoder (from paper)
_note_num_heads: Number of attention heads in transformer encoder (from paper)
_note_num_transformer_layers: Number of transformer encoder layers (from paper)
_note_num_graph_layers: Number of GNN layers for road network encoding (from paper)
_note_drop_edge_rate: Edge dropout rate for graph augmentation (from paper)
_note_drop_road_rate: Road masking rate for sequence augmentation (from paper)
_note_lambda_st: Weight for spatial-temporal (node-trajectory) loss, l_ss=l_tt=0.5*(1-lambda_st) (from paper)
_note_loss_measure: Contrastive loss type: 'jsd' (Jensen-Shannon Divergence), 'nce', or 'ntx' (from paper)
_note_mode: Encoding mode: 's' (structural with GNN) or 'p' (pure embeddings) (from paper)
_note_weighted_loss: Whether to use weighted node-sequence loss (from paper)
